# Memetic Brand Labs by adpr

## Project Overview
Memetic Brand Labs is a specialized branding initiative by **adpr.work**. We focus on turning ordinary memes into viral content that drives engagement, specifically tailored for Web3 and AI companies. We do not just create logos or campaigns; we build **Memetic Brand Systems**.

## Core Mission
To turn complex technical ideas into culture that spreads. We build shared language, recognizable narratives, and repeatable cultural signals so that ideas don't just reach people—they resonate, repeat, and stick.

## What We Do
We help founders transform deep, technical ideas into culture-first branding systems. Think of it as **creative intelligence for the attention economy**, where branding meets behavior, community, and code.

### Key Features
- **Shared Language**: Creating a vocabulary that community members adopt and spread.
- **Recognizable Narratives**: Stories that are easy to understand and retell.
- **Repeatable Cultural Signals**: Visual and verbal hooks that are engineered for virality.

## Target Audience
- Web3 Founders
- AI Companies
- Deep Tech Innovators
- Brands looking to leverage internet culture

## Website Structure
- **/**: Landing page explaining the value proposition, methodology ("Turn Ordinary"), and process.
- **/application-form**: A guided form for interested clients to apply for the program.

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: React (Vite)
- **Styling**: Modern CSS
- **Routing**: React Router

## Contact / Creator
- **Creator**: adpr
- **Website**: [adpr.work](https://www.adpr.work)
